title: The Duskbloods, FromSoftware's new game for Switch 2, will have a closed network test in August
summary: Players will be able to request access to the multiplayer test of the Nintendo Switch 2 exclusive between August 21 and 23.

title: Denshattack receives positive reviews as a tribute to Dreamcast racing games
summary: The Spanish train racing game is praised for its originality and frenetic pace, although some note that it feels somewhat cluttered.

title: Reports detail the magnitude of layoffs at Xbox and the atmosphere of uncertainty among workers
summary: The cuts have affected key studios, including the team behind The Elder Scrolls Online, and have sparked protests from unionized workers.

title: Overwatch abandons Stadium mode after less than a year and a half due to lack of players
summary: The MOBA-inspired mode will no longer receive new heroes or maps due to a significant decline in the user base.

title: PlayStation Plus announces July 2026 games for Extra and Premium subscribers
summary: The catalog includes two major open-world games and several classic PS2 titles, according to the list revealed by Sony.

title: Glen Schofield, co-creator of Dead Space, announces his retirement from video game development
summary: The veteran producer, also known for his work on Call of Duty, bids farewell with an emotional message after decades of career.

title: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey sweeps Rotten Tomatoes and expands into Fortnite
summary: The epic starring Matt Damon receives a near-perfect score, while its character already appears in the popular battle royale.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced arrives on Steam with criticism for omitted content but commercial success
summary: The remake of the pirate classic launches with criticism for omitted content but achieves the best debut in the series on Steam.

title: 100% of Japanese online game developers use generative artificial intelligence
summary: According to a survey, the use of AI focuses on preference analysis and behavior prediction, although concerns about copyright infringement are growing.

title: Valve removes Steam Deck LCD parts, complicating battery replacement
summary: Players fear that the decision will reduce the device's lifespan, as third-party alternatives will be the only option.

title: GOG criticizes Sony for the end of physical discs and defends the player's right to own their games
summary: The PC platform reminds that players do not need permission to play what they have bought, in a pro-consumer message.

title: Once Upon a Katamari comes to Nintendo Switch 2 on October 8 with new downloadable content
summary: The Katamari saga game launches on Nintendo's new console accompanied by the DLC Rolling LIVE Highlights.

title: Jurassic World Evolution 2: Complete Edition launches on Nintendo Switch 2 on July 30
summary: The complete edition of the Jurassic park simulator will arrive on the console with all additional content included.

title: Pokémon Unite pulled from Pokémon World Championship starting in 2027
summary: The team strategy game disappears from the official competitive circuit, a decision fans consider unfair.

title: Artificial intelligence floods the market with clones of independent video games
summary: Small studios see their games massively replicated by AI tools, threatening originality in the sector.

title: A CD Projekt veteran warns that the remake of The Witcher as an open world could be a mistake
summary: The designer expresses doubts about adapting the original to an open-world format, which would create design problems.

title: Final Fantasy Resonance shows new 'Pixel' trailer with game details
summary: Square Enix reveals new images and features of the highly anticipated title coming to Nintendo Switch.

title: Square Enix surprises with release of Star Ocean: The Second Story R version for Switch 2
summary: The enhanced version of the classic RPG is now available on Nintendo's new console without prior notice.

title: Mario Tennis Fever updated with content inspired by Super Mario Galaxy
summary: Patch 1.1.0 adds a new court, racket, and special match mode, along with fixes.

title: Former Rockstar producer justifies the absence of GTA 6 on PC at launch due to technical limitations
summary: The developer states that prioritizing consoles allows optimizing the game before adapting it to varied hardware.
